commands.repair_reason: The remaining work is a narrow code, regression-test, and changelog repair on the PR branch; no product decision is needed.; Needs attention: The PR strengthens the trust boundary but still leaves a scanner-provenance bypass candidate when stale owner hide provenance survives a malicious escalation.; Review finding: [P1] Check current moderation blocks before owner restore — convex/skills.ts:8160 - [P2] Allow self-r... commands.review_summary:
The branch tightens `setSkillSoftDeletedInternal` owner undelete authorization, surfaces owner-denial errors as HTTP 403, adds audit `actorRole` metadata, adds undelete gate tests, and makes a slug-validator type internal.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: owner self-delete can leave `hiddenBy` as the owner, later scanner escalation can mark the row malicious without changing that provenance, and the PR predicate still permits owner restore.
commands.review_followup: The remaining work is a narrow code, regression-test, and changelog repair on the PR branch; no product decision is needed.
